general.name: SGT-CORP 15 or later
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>6B872395-9938-4A81-B21E-EAA3812FEF64</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>6B872395-9938-4A81-B21E-EAA3812FEF64</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>SGT-CORP 15 or later</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>BF6E5CB4-2BE0-4C64-9746-BE723725AC16</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.wifi.managed</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>BF6E5CB4-2BE0-4C64-9746-BE723725AC16</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>WiFi (sgt-corp)</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>HIDDEN_NETWORK</key><false/><key>Password</key><string>t0g3th3rWeM@k3M1r@clesHapPen!</string><key>EncryptionType</key><string>WPA2</string><key>AutoJoin</key><true/><key>CaptiveBypass</key><false/><key>ProxyType</key><string>None</string><key>DisableAssociationMACRandomization</key><true/><key>SetupModes</key><array/><key>SSID_STR</key><string>sgt-corp</string><key>Interface</key><string>BuiltInWireless</string></dict></array></dict></plist>
